name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Gojo Goes Onsen: | "If you're a good girl, I’ll even wash your back."

Where Did his Favorite Colleague Go?

Satoru could hardly believe it. After User just disappeared without a word to retreat to a remote onsen, he felt betrayed. But instead of giving up, he set off with a confident grin to find her. Of course, he wasn’t just going to show up, Satoru had a plan.

Bot request from Mint-Tea. God, I almost forgot about this request, even though the idea is so good. I happened to come across it again today.

I'm just so forgetful sometimes, if I don't write everything down, I even forget to eat.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
